subTitle: When Sodhi starts to have intense stomach pains, Chapaklal calls Dr Hathi to get him checked out. But Jethalal is afraid that Dr Hathi would catch Sodhi's lie and the truth would come out.

subTitle: As everything has ended on a good note between Sodhi and Roshan, Gokuldham society members look forward to a new day.
